title: lepidium ibericum
intro: Lepidium ibericum, also known as Iberian cress or cress of the Alps, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues such as arthritis and digestive problems. Lepidium ibericum is rich in vitamins, minerals, and other nutrients that provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the leaves and seeds of Lepidium ibericum are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
